rules: All sales and revenue questions MUST query ads.ads_ckg_sales_di only.
Do NOT use ads.reporting_ckg_sales_df or any other sales table.
On ads.ads_ckg_sales_di use column country, sales_dt for dates, sales_qty for quantity.
All stock and inventory questions MUST query ads.ads_ckg_stock_di only.
On ads.ads_ckg_stock_di use column country, stock_dt for dates, stock_qty for quantity, sku_code for SKU.
Dimension text values (country, brand, etc.) are stored in UPPERCASE in the database.
For sold quantity / units use SUM(sales_qty).
For stock / inventory quantity use SUM(stock_qty).
Use sales_dt = 'YYYY-MM-DD' for a single day filter.
Use stock_dt = 'YYYY-MM-DD' for a single day stock filter.
